cdn-hosts-workaround.note: Community handles CDN workaround via /etc/hosts, upstream fix in librespot #1722

picoreplayer-bootlocal.note: piCorePlayer persistence — community helps each other

sha-mismatch-install-loop.note: repo.xml SHA was wrong for v2.3.1, fixed in v2.3.2+. CJS and Andy_NO affected.

loud-distorted-playback.note: Volume normalization was a no-op. Fixed in v2.3.8. Awaiting confirmation from plasticator2 (post #148).

pcp-update-loop.note: Andy_NO: pCP v11.1.0 update checkbox resets after restart. Likely overlay-FS persistence. CJS helping (posts #146-147).

shuffleindex-crash.note: Fixed in v2.1.3 — streamingSongIndex replaces non-existent shuffleIndex

docker-mdns-port-conflict.note: tontze: TrueNAS Docker, port 5353 EADDRINUSE blocks mDNS discovery. Related to #60.
